summary: Stripe payment integration testing completed. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend checkout flow works correctly with 3-step navigation and Stripe redirect. Order Success page shows correct pending/processing state for unpaid orders.

issues: Duplicate route for /shop/order-success at lines 486 and 578 - first route (ShopOrderSuccess) takes precedence over OrderSuccessPage

evidence: Creates order with order_id and order_number
Validates required customer fields (email, firstName, lastName)
Calculates delivery fee server-side based on postcode zones
Shows error state when no session_id provided
Shows Stripe branding 'Pay Securely with Stripe'
Displays payment methods: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Apple Pay, Google Pay
Place Order button shows total amount
Uses CheckoutSessionRequest(amount, currency, success_url, cancel_url, metadata)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly uses emergentintegrations library for Stripe integration
CheckoutSessionRequest correctly passes amount as float, currency as 'gbp', success_url, cancel_url, and metadata
Order total is recalculated server-side for security (never trusts frontend total)
Stripe session_id is stored in order document for status tracking
Payment transaction records are created for audit trail

success_rate.frontend: 100% (checkout flow and order success page verified)

seed_data_creation: Test orders created via guest checkout API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration fully functional. Guest checkout flow: 1) POST /api/shop/guest-checkout creates order, 2) POST /api/shop/guest-checkout/pay creates Stripe session with CheckoutSessionRequest, 3) Frontend redirects to session.url, 4) After payment, Stripe redirects to /shop/order-success?session_id=X&order_id=Y, 5) GET /api/shop/guest-checkout/status/{session_id} checks payment status. Cart items stored in localStorage key 'tile_cart'. Note: Actual payment completion requires real card - we verified session creation and status endpoints work correctly.
